Metadata.siteFullDescription: Organize problems by subject, track your progress, and build your knowledge systematically
Metadata.allProblemSetsMetaDescription: View and manage your problem sets. Problem sets enable you to group problems together to review or to share with others.
Metadata.statisticsMetaDescription: Track your study progress, mastery, and streaks

Auth.privacyPolicyAgreement: I have read and agree to the

Auth.confirmationLinkSent: We've sent a confirmation link to your email address

Auth.resetDescription: If you registered using your email and password, you will receive a password reset email.
Auth.updatePasswordDesc: Choose a strong password for your account

Auth.errorEncountered: We encountered an error while processing your request

Landing.heroSubtitle: Organize the problems you got wrong, track your progress, and watch your understanding grow — one question at a time.
Landing.writeMath: Write math, format solutions, capture everything
Landing.fullFormattingDesc: headings, bold, italic, lists, code blocks
Landing.threeProblemTypesDesc: MCQ, short answer, or extended — WQN handles them all
Landing.mcqDesc: Radio button choices with auto-marking and a visual choice picker. Know instantly if you got it right.
Landing.shortAnswerDesc: Text or numeric answers with tolerance. Supports multiple accepted answers for flexible marking.
Landing.extendedAnswerDesc: Free-form responses for proofs, essays, and explanations. Full rich-text support included.
Landing.snapPhoto: Got a problem? Snap a photo
Landing.snapPhotoDesc: Upload an image of any worksheet or handwritten note. Our AI extracts the problem, detects math, and classifies the type — instantly.
Landing.studySessions: Study sessions that track your progress
Landing.everyDetail: Every detail designed to help you study better
Landing.subjectOrgDesc: Color-coded notebooks with custom icons. Keep every subject neatly separated and easy to find.
Landing.tagSystemDesc: Subject-specific tags for fine-grained categorization. Filter and find problems in seconds.
Landing.sharingDesc: Private, limited, or public sharing options. Share your curated problem sets with classmates.
Landing.darkModeDesc: Full light and dark theme support. Study comfortably at any hour.
Landing.statusTrackingDesc: Wrong, Needs Review, Mastered — track every problem's progression automatically.
Landing.studyStreaksMoreDesc: Consecutive day tracking to build habits. Stay motivated and keep your streak alive.
Landing.compareTraditional: See how WQN compares to traditional methods
Landing.readyToMaster: Ready to turn mistakes into mastery?
Landing.joinStudents: Join students who are learning smarter with Wrong Question Notebook.
Landing.footerTagline: Turn wrong answers into mastered skills.
Landing.builtWith: Built with Next.js and a Rust API.

Onboarding.welcomeDesc: Log the problems you get wrong, review them over time, and track your mastery. Let's get you started.
Onboarding.threeSteps: Three simple steps to master your learning
Onboarding.createSubjectDesc: Organize by topic — Math, Physics, or anything you study
Onboarding.logProblemsDesc: Add problems you got wrong with solutions and tags
Onboarding.reviewMasterDesc: Revisit problems and track your progress to mastery
Onboarding.completedSteps: You've completed the getting started steps.

Statistics.title: Statistics
Statistics.subtitle: Track your progress, study habits, and mastery over time.

Admin.manageUsers: Manage user accounts, roles, and permissions
Admin.deleteUserDesc: Are you sure you want to delete {username}? This action cannot be undone.

Admin.deleteUserWarning: This will delete all their data including subjects, problems, files, and attachments. This action cannot be undone.

Admin.showBannerDesc: Show the announcement banner across the app
Admin.limitDefaultsDesc: Set the global default usage limits and daily AI quotas applied to every user without a per-user override. Empty a field to reset it back to the built-in baseline.
